headline: Cloud Infrastructure Rotation Intensifies as AMD Surges While Microsoft Stumbles
summary: AI compute demand is driving a market rotation from cloud platforms to semiconductor stocks. AMD leads with 20% monthly gains, while Broadcom and NVIDIA show strong fundamentals. Microsoft lags as capital flows to pure-play AI infrastructure beneficiaries.
